productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Chuck Taylor Checks HI Red Canvas Shoe
description: CompositionRed, blue highankle check patterned unisex lace-up shoes made with canvas uppers and rubber outsoles, All Star heel patchshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterThese funky red and blue check high ankle shoes from converse come in a classic design with durable canvas uppers, black canvas lining and cushioned footbed for hours of uniterrupted comfort. The All Star heel patch ups the style quotient. The black lace-up front with metallic eyelets ensures a snug Fit while the original rubber toe box and toe guard give added protection. The multi directional outsole gives added grip. Perfect for urban wear.
